<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the organization onboarding portal links"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/projects/{project_id}/organizations/{organization_id}/onboarding-portal-links"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the organization onboarding portal links.
